title: Add OAuth 2.0 authentication support
description:
Implements OAuth 2.0 authorization code flow for API gateway authentication.

Changes:
- Add OAuth configuration to settings
- Implement token endpoint
- Add JWT validation middleware
- Create token refresh logic
- Add rate limiting per client

Related Jira: PROJ-1001
author: user-003

title: Integrate OAuth middleware with gateway routes
description:
Integrates the OAuth middleware with API gateway routes.

Changes:
- Add OAuth middleware to gateway
- Configure protected routes
- Add token validation for all auth endpoints
- Update OpenAPI spec

Related Jira: PROJ-1001
author: user-003

title: Add user management API endpoints
author: user-004

title: Integrate Razorpay payment gateway
description:
Integrates Razorpay payment gateway for subscription payments.

Features:
- Payment flow from checkout to confirmation
- Webhook handling for payment events
- Refund processing
- Failed payment retry logic

Related Jira: PROJ-1004
Blocked by: Waiting for Razorpay credentials
author: user-005

title: Add payment transaction schema
description:
Creates database schema for payment transactions.

Tables added:
- payments (id, user_id, amount, currency, status, gateway, created_at, updated_at)
- refunds (id, payment_id, amount, reason, status, created_at, updated_at)
- payment_methods (id, user_id, type, details, is_default, created_at, updated_at)

Related Jira: PROJ-1005
author: user-002

title: Add analytics dashboard for admin
description:
Implements analytics dashboard for admin panel.

Components:
- UserSignupsChart
- ActiveUsersChart
- RevenueMetrics
- FeatureUsageStats
- DateRangeFilter
- ExportButton

Related Jira: PROJ-1008
author: user-007

title: Add API endpoints for dashboard data
description:
Creates backend API endpoints for dashboard analytics.

Endpoints:
- GET /api/v1/analytics/signups
- GET /api/v1/analytics/active-users
- GET /api/v1/analytics/revenue
- GET /api/v1/analytics/feature-usage

Related Jira: PROJ-1009
author: user-003

title: Fix database connection leak in connection pool
description:
Fixes database connection leak by properly closing connections in connection pool.

Root Cause:
Connections were not being properly released back to the pool when errors occurred during query execution.

Related Jira: PROJ-1010
Related Incident: INC-003
author: user-011

title: Add OAuth 2.0 authentication documentation
description:
Adds comprehensive documentation for OAuth 2.0 authentication workflow.

Related Jira: PROJ-1013
author: user-004

title: Implement password reset flow
description:
Implements secure password reset flow for users.

Related Jira: PROJ-1017
author: user-005

title: Fix Kubernetes deployment image pull issues
description:
Fixes Kubernetes deployment failures caused by image pull issues.

Root Cause:
Deployments were failing because Kubernetes couldn't authenticate with the private container registry.

Related Jira: PROJ-1020
Related Incident: INC-006
author: user-010

title: Implement dark mode theme support
description:
Adds dark mode toggle and theme support using CSS custom properties.

Related Jira: PROJ-1021
author: user-008

title: Add query optimization for slow API endpoints
description:
Optimizes slow database queries causing API latency degradation.

Changes:
- Add database indexes for frequently queried columns
- Optimize N+1 queries in orders endpoint
- Add query caching for user lookups
- Reduce payload sizes

Related Jira: PROJ-1022
Related Incident: INC-007
author: user-002

title: Fix XSS vulnerability in user profile bio field
description:
Patches cross-site scripting vulnerability in user profile page.

Changes:
- Add input sanitization for bio field
- Implement Content Security Policy headers
- Add output encoding for all user-generated content
- Add input validation on save endpoint

Related Jira: PROJ-1025
CVSS Score: 7.5
author: user-003

title: Mobile responsive layout broken on iOS Safari
description:
Several pages have broken layouts on iOS Safari 17. Navigation menu overflows, cards overlap, and the footer is not visible.

Affected pages:
- Dashboard
- Profile settings
- Payment history

Screenshots attached in comments.
author: user-014

title: Payment webhook signature verification failing intermittently
description:
Razorpay webhook signature verification fails for approximately 5% of incoming webhooks. This causes payment status updates to be missed.

Logs show clock skew between our servers and Razorpay's timestamp.
author: user-005

title: Grafana dashboard showing stale metrics after migration
description:
After migrating to the new Prometheus cluster, several Grafana dashboards are showing stale or missing metrics.

Affected dashboards:
- API Response Times
- Database Connection Pool
- Kubernetes Node Health

Metrics appear to stop updating after 2026-06-15 00:00 UTC.
author: user-011

title: Add accessibility improvements to form components
description:
Improves accessibility of form components to meet WCAG 2.1 AA standards.

Changes:
- Add ARIA labels to all form inputs
- Improve keyboard navigation
- Add screen reader announcements for validation errors
- Fix color contrast ratios
- Add focus indicators
author: user-009

title: CI pipeline failing on auth-service after dependency update
description:
CI build for auth-service has been failing since June 16 due to incompatible dependency versions.

Error:
ModuleNotFoundError: No module named 'cryptography.hazmat.primitives.asymmetric.ed25519'

This is blocking all PRs on the auth-service repository.
author: user-004

title: Update Terraform modules for AWS cost optimization
description:
Updates Terraform modules to optimize AWS costs.

Changes:
- Switch to ARM-based instances where possible
- Enable S3 intelligent tiering
- Right-size RDS instances based on usage metrics
- Add reserved instance recommendations

Estimated monthly savings: $2,400
author: user-013

title: Email delivery rate dropped to 82% - investigate bounce handling
description:
Email delivery success rate has dropped from 97% to 82% over the past week. Bounce handling appears to not be processing soft bounces correctly, leading to repeated delivery attempts to invalid addresses.

This is affecting transactional emails including password resets and order confirmations.
author: user-012

title: Security alert: Dependabot flagged 3 critical vulnerabilities
description:
Dependabot has flagged 3 critical vulnerabilities in the admin panel dependencies:

1. webpack-dev-middleware: CVE-2024-29180 (Path traversal)
2. express: CVE-2024-29041 (Open redirect)
3. follow-redirects: CVE-2024-28849 (Authorization header leak)

All three have available patches.
author: dependabot
